allow: WebSearch

PowerShell($ids = @\('photo-1605810230434-7631ac76ec81','photo-1492684223066-81342ee5ff30','photo-1470229722913-7c0e2dbbafd3','photo-1558494949-ef010cbdcc31','photo-1518770660439-4636190af475','photo-1517245386807-bb43f82c33c4','photo-1516035069371-29a1b244cc32','photo-1477959858617-67f85cf4f1df','photo-1486406146926-c627a92ad1ab','photo-1522071820081-009f0129c71c'\); foreach\($id in $ids\){ try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "https://images.unsplash.com/$id?q=80&w=200&auto=format&fit=crop" -Method Get -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 15; Write-Output "$id => $\($r.StatusCode\) $\($r.Headers['Content-Type']\)" } catch { Write-Output "$id => FAIL" } })

PowerShell(try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1518770660439-4636190af475?q=80&w=200" -Method Get -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 25; Write-Output "OK $\($r.StatusCode\) $\($r.Headers['Content-Type']\)" } catch { Write-Output \("ERR: " + $_.Exception.Message\); if\($_.Exception.Response\){ Write-Output \("HTTP: " + [int]$_.Exception.Response.StatusCode\) } })
WebFetch(domain:www.pexels.com)

PowerShell($ids = @\('photo-1605810230434-7631ac76ec81','photo-1492684223066-81342ee5ff30','photo-1470229722913-7c0e2dbbafd3','photo-1558494949-ef010cbdcc31','photo-1517245386807-bb43f82c33c4','photo-1516035069371-29a1b244cc32','photo-1477959858617-67f85cf4f1df','photo-1486406146926-c627a92ad1ab','photo-1522071820081-009f0129c71c','photo-1519389950473-47ba0277781c'\); foreach\($id in $ids\){ $ok=$false; for\($i=0;$i -lt 3 -and -not $ok;$i++\){ try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "https://images.unsplash.com/$\($id\)?q=80&w=200" -Method Get -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 25; Write-Output "$id => $\($r.StatusCode\) $\($r.Headers['Content-Type']\)"; $ok=$true } catch { Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 800 } }; if\(-not $ok\){ Write-Output "$id => FAIL\(3x\)" } })

PowerShell($ids = @\('photo-1566073771259-6a8506099945','photo-1551882547-ff40c63fe5fa','photo-1550684376-efcbd6e3f031','photo-1520034475321-cbe63696469a','photo-1551288049-bebda4e38f71','photo-1581092918056-0c4c3acd3789','photo-1509062522246-3755977927d7','photo-1524178232363-1fb2b075b655','photo-1497366811353-6870744d04b2','photo-1504384308090-c894fdcc538d','photo-1518770660439-4636190af475','photo-1451187580459-43490279c0fa'\); foreach\($id in $ids\){ $ok=$false; for\($i=0;$i -lt 3 -and -not $ok;$i++\){ try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "https://images.unsplash.com/$\($id\)?q=80&w=200" -Method Get -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 25; Write-Output "$id => $\($r.StatusCode\) $\($r.Headers['Content-Type']\)"; $ok=$true } catch { Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 800 } }; if\(-not $ok\){ Write-Output "$id => FAIL\(3x\)" } })

PowerShell(foreach\($u in @\('https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/motion@11.11.13/dist/motion.min.js','https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/motion@11.11.13/dist/motion.js'\)\){ try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri $u -Method Get -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 20; Write-Output "$u => $\($r.StatusCode\) len=$\($r.RawContentLength\)"; $head = \([System.Text.Encoding]::UTF8.GetString\($r.Content[0..200]\)\); Write-Output \("head: " + $head.Substring\(0,[Math]::Min\(150,$head.Length\)\)\) } catch { Write-Output "$u => FAIL $\($_.Exception.Message\)" } })

PowerShell($html = Get-Content "index.html" -Raw; $urls = [regex]::Matches\($html, 'https://[^"''\\s>]+'\) | ForEach-Object { $_.Value } | Sort-Object -Unique; foreach\($u in $urls\){ if\($u -match 'fonts.googleapis|fonts.gstatic|images.unsplash.com$|images.pexels.com$'\){ continue }; $ok=$false; for\($i=0;$i -lt 3 -and -not $ok;$i++\){ try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri $u -Method Get -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 30; Write-Output "OK  $\($r.StatusCode\) $\($r.Headers['Content-Type']\)  $u"; $ok=$true } catch { Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 900 } }; if\(-not $ok\){ Write-Output "FAIL $u" } })

PowerShell($dir = "C:\\Users\\Mohd\\AppData\\Local\\Temp\\claude\\d--D-drive-Backup-Digital-Vint-mindstec\\1018bd93-e0dd-41bb-8a30-906bbb4369e8\\scratchpad"; $html = Get-Content "index.html" -Raw; $snippet = "<script>window.addEventListener\('load',\(\)=>{const m=location.search.match\(/s=\(\\d+\)/\);if\(m\){setTimeout\(\(\)=>{window.scrollTo\(0,+m[1]\);if\(window.ScrollTrigger\)ScrollTrigger.refresh\(\);},400\);}}\);</script></body>"; $test = $html -replace '</body>', $snippet; Set-Content -Path "$dir\\test.html" -Value $test -Encoding utf8 -NoNewline; Write-Output "written $\(\(Get-Item "$dir\\test.html"\).Length\)")

PowerShell(try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/dotted-map@2.2.3/+esm" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 30; Write-Output "esm: $\($r.StatusCode\) len=$\($r.RawContentLength\)"; $txt=[Text.Encoding]::UTF8.GetString\($r.Content\); Write-Output \($txt.Substring\(0,200\)\) } catch { Write-Output "FAIL $\($_.Exception.Message\)" })

PowerShell(Add-Type -AssemblyName System.Drawing; $dir = "C:\\Users\\Mohd\\AppData\\Local\\Temp\\claude\\d--D-drive-Backup-Digital-Vint-mindstec\\1018bd93-e0dd-41bb-8a30-906bbb4369e8\\scratchpad"; $src = [System.Drawing.Bitmap]::FromFile\("$dir\\full4.png"\); $rect = New-Object System.Drawing.Rectangle\(0, 4550, 1280, 1250\); $crop = $src.Clone\($rect, $src.PixelFormat\); $crop.Save\("$dir\\map-crop.png"\); $src.Dispose\(\); $crop.Dispose\(\); Write-Output "saved")

PowerShell(Add-Type -AssemblyName System.Drawing; $src = [System.Drawing.Bitmap]::FromFile\("d:\\D drive Backup\\Digital Vint\\mindstec\\mindstec-logo.png"\); $colors = @{}; for\($x=110;$x -lt 335;$x+=1\){ for\($y=30;$y -lt 75;$y+=1\){ $p=$src.GetPixel\($x,$y\); if\($p.A -gt 30\){ $k="{0:X2}{1:X2}{2:X2}{3:X2}" -f $p.A,$p.R,$p.G,$p.B; $colors[$k]++ } } }; $colors.GetEnumerator\(\) | Sort-Object Value -Descending | Select-Object -First 10 | ForEach-Object { Write-Output "ARGB #$\($_.Key\) x$\($_.Value\)" }; $src.Dispose\(\))

PowerShell(Add-Type -AssemblyName System.Drawing; $src = [System.Drawing.Bitmap]::FromFile\("d:\\D drive Backup\\Digital Vint\\mindstec\\mindstec-logo.png"\); $white=0;$black=0;$other=0; for\($x=0;$x -lt 338;$x++\){ for\($y=0;$y -lt 119;$y++\){ $p=$src.GetPixel\($x,$y\); if\($p.A -gt 30\){ if\($p.R -gt 200 -and $p.G -gt 200 -and $p.B -gt 200\){$white++} elseif\($p.R -lt 60 -and $p.G -lt 60 -and $p.B -lt 60\){$black++} else {$other++} } } }; Write-Output "white=$white black=$black other=$other"; $src.Dispose\(\))

PowerShell(Add-Type -AssemblyName System.Drawing; $src = [System.Drawing.Bitmap]::FromFile\("d:\\D drive Backup\\Digital Vint\\mindstec\\mindstec-logo.png"\); $clean = New-Object System.Drawing.Bitmap\($src.Width, $src.Height, [System.Drawing.Imaging.PixelFormat]::Format32bppArgb\); $g=[System.Drawing.Graphics]::FromImage\($clean\); $g.DrawImage\($src,0,0,$src.Width,$src.Height\); $g.Dispose\(\); $clean.Save\("d:\\D drive Backup\\Digital Vint\\mindstec\\mindstec-logo-web.png", [System.Drawing.Imaging.ImageFormat]::Png\); $src.Dispose\(\); $clean.Dispose\(\); $b = [IO.File]::ReadAllBytes\("d:\\D drive Backup\\Digital Vint\\mindstec\\mindstec-logo-web.png"\); $s = [Text.Encoding]::ASCII.GetString\($b\); Write-Output "new file: $\($b.Length\) bytes, gAMA present: $\($s.Contains\('gAMA'\)\), PLTE present: $\($s.Contains\('PLTE'\)\)")

PowerShell($b = [IO.File]::ReadAllBytes\("d:\\D drive Backup\\Digital Vint\\mindstec\\mindstec-logo-web.png"\); $s = [Text.Encoding]::ASCII.GetString\($b\); $i = $s.IndexOf\('gAMA'\) + 4; $gval = \($b[$i] -shl 24\) -bor \($b[$i+1] -shl 16\) -bor \($b[$i+2] -shl 8\) -bor $b[$i+3]; Write-Output "gAMA = $gval \(gamma=$\($gval/100000\)\)")

PowerShell($path = "d:\\D drive Backup\\Digital Vint\\mindstec\\mindstec-logo-web.png"; $b = [IO.File]::ReadAllBytes\($path\); $s = [Text.Encoding]::ASCII.GetString\($b\); $removed = @\(\); foreach\($chunk in @\('gAMA','cHRM'\)\){ $s = [Text.Encoding]::ASCII.GetString\($b\); $idx = $s.IndexOf\($chunk\); if\($idx -ge 0\){ $start = $idx - 4; $len = \($b[$start] -shl 24\) -bor \($b[$start+1] -shl 16\) -bor \($b[$start+2] -shl 8\) -bor $b[$start+3]; $total = 4 + 4 + $len + 4; $nb = New-Object byte[] \($b.Length - $total\); [Array]::Copy\($b, 0, $nb, 0, $start\); [Array]::Copy\($b, $start + $total, $nb, $start, $b.Length - $start - $total\); $b = $nb; $removed += "$chunk\($total bytes\)" } }; [IO.File]::WriteAllBytes\($path, $b\); $s2 = [Text.Encoding]::ASCII.GetString\($b\); Write-Output "removed: $\($removed -join ', '\); now $\($b.Length\) bytes; gAMA present: $\($s2.Contains\('gAMA'\)\); sRGB present: $\($s2.Contains\('sRGB'\)\)")

PowerShell(\(Get-Content "index.html" -Raw -Encoding UTF8\) | ForEach-Object { $_ -replace 'mindstec-logo\\.png', 'mindstec-logo-web.png' } | Set-Content "index.html" -Encoding UTF8 -NoNewline; Select-String -Path "index.html" -Pattern 'mindstec-logo' | ForEach-Object { $_.LineNumber.ToString\(\) + ': ' + $_.Line.Trim\(\).Substring\(0, [Math]::Min\(100, $_.Line.Trim\(\).Length\)\) })

PowerShell($dir = "C:\\Users\\Mohd\\AppData\\Local\\Temp\\claude\\d--D-drive-Backup-Digital-Vint-mindstec\\1018bd93-e0dd-41bb-8a30-906bbb4369e8\\scratchpad"; try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "https://www.mindstec.com/in/about-us/" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 40 -UserAgent "Mozilla/5.0 \(Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64\) AppleWebKit/537.36 \(KHTML, like Gecko\) Chrome/126 Safari/537.36"; [IO.File]::WriteAllText\("$dir\\about-src.html", $r.Content, \(New-Object Text.UTF8Encoding\($false\)\)\); Write-Output "fetched $\($r.Content.Length\) chars" } catch { Write-Output "FAIL: $\($_.Exception.Message\)" })

PowerShell($dir = "C:\\Users\\Mohd\\AppData\\Local\\Temp\\claude\\d--D-drive-Backup-Digital-Vint-mindstec\\1018bd93-e0dd-41bb-8a30-906bbb4369e8\\scratchpad"; $html = [IO.File]::ReadAllText\("$dir\\about-src.html"\); $names = @\('Syed','Sabarishan','Manasa','Karthikeyan Sekar','Sneha','Karthikeyan Selvaraj','Flavia','Sajid'\); foreach\($n in $names\){ $idx = $html.IndexOf\($n\); while\($idx -ge 0 -and $idx -lt $html.Length\){ $start = [Math]::Max\(0, $idx-1500\); $ctx = $html.Substring\($start, [Math]::Min\(1600, $html.Length-$start\)\); $m = [regex]::Matches\($ctx, 'uploads/[^"''\\s\\\)]+\\.\(?:jpg|jpeg|png|webp\)'\); if\($m.Count -gt 0\){ Write-Output "$n => $\($m[$m.Count-1].Value\)"; break }; $idx = $html.IndexOf\($n, $idx+1\) } })

PowerShell($dir = "C:\\Users\\Mohd\\AppData\\Local\\Temp\\claude\\d--D-drive-Backup-Digital-Vint-mindstec\\1018bd93-e0dd-41bb-8a30-906bbb4369e8\\scratchpad"; $html = [IO.File]::ReadAllText\("$dir\\about-src.html"\); Write-Output "Syed idx: $\($html.IndexOf\('Syed'\)\)"; Write-Output "Wahab idx: $\($html.IndexOf\('Wahab'\)\)"; Write-Output "Founder idx: $\($html.IndexOf\('Founder'\)\)"; Write-Output "image2 idx: $\($html.IndexOf\('2026/03/image2'\)\)"; Write-Output "team idx: $\($html.IndexOf\('team'\)\)")

PowerShell($dir = "C:\\Users\\Mohd\\AppData\\Local\\Temp\\claude\\d--D-drive-Backup-Digital-Vint-mindstec\\1018bd93-e0dd-41bb-8a30-906bbb4369e8\\scratchpad"; $html = [IO.File]::ReadAllText\("$dir\\about-src.html"\); $seg = $html.Substring\(252000, 25000\); $clean = $seg -replace '<[^>]+>', "`n" -replace '[\\r\\n]+', "`n"; \($clean -split "`n" | Where-Object { $_.Trim\(\).Length -gt 2 -and $_.Trim\(\).Length -lt 80 } | Select-Object -First 40\) -join ' | ')

PowerShell($dir = "C:\\Users\\Mohd\\AppData\\Local\\Temp\\claude\\d--D-drive-Backup-Digital-Vint-mindstec\\1018bd93-e0dd-41bb-8a30-906bbb4369e8\\scratchpad"; $ua = "Mozilla/5.0 \(Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64\) AppleWebKit/537.36 Chrome/126 Safari/537.36"; try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "https://www.mindstec.com/in/partners/" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 40 -UserAgent $ua; [IO.File]::WriteAllText\("$dir\\partners-src.html", $r.Content, \(New-Object Text.UTF8Encoding\($false\)\)\); Write-Output "fetched $\($r.Content.Length\) chars" } catch { Write-Output "FAIL: $\($_.Exception.Message\)" })

PowerShell(foreach\($f in @\('about.html','partners.html'\)\){ $p = "d:\\D drive Backup\\Digital Vint\\mindstec\\$f"; $t = [IO.File]::ReadAllText\($p, [Text.Encoding]::UTF8\); $t = $t.Replace\('href="index.html#solutions"', 'href="solutions.html"'\); [IO.File]::WriteAllText\($p, $t, \(New-Object Text.UTF8Encoding\($false\)\)\); Write-Output "$f updated" }; Select-String -Path "d:\\D drive Backup\\Digital Vint\\mindstec\\about.html","d:\\D drive Backup\\Digital Vint\\mindstec\\partners.html" -Pattern 'index.html#solutions' | Measure-Object | ForEach-Object { "remaining refs: $\($_.Count\)" })
